texto: Muse’s creations are predominately lyrical often resulting in poetic sonnets and fairytale like art.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Earl M. Coleman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Muse’s creations are predominately lyrical often resulting in poetic sonnets and fairytale like art.” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, author, author-quote pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de author-quote e fairytale.

frase_original: Muse’s creations are predominately lyrical often resulting in poetic sonnets and fairytale like art.

texto: Early in her career, Muse engaged her skills for technical purposes, such as document translation and schematic visualizations for government entities. She continued to write and paint poetically, in secret, using her pen name, Muse. An inner compass is evident in her work. Pieces reflect both past and present dilemmas; while showcasing her victories in overcoming these obstacles ~ all from her faith based perspective. Light touches of modernism play hand in hand with old world strokes, offering highly visceral readings.

She continued to write and paint poetically, in secret, using her pen name, Muse. An inner compass is evident in her work.
